title: Import Candidate PM UI Review
objective: Add a read-only PM-facing import-candidate review route that consumes GET /api/v1/reads/project-import-candidate and presents the Temp Power candidate as an exception-first review packet with required decisions, warnings, source traceability, proposed structure, resource context, and explicit no-mutation guardrails.
active_role: Delegated Technical Repo Authority / PM Runtime Product Coordinator / UI Executor
orchestration_inputs: PM Lane 032 published the read-only project-import-candidate endpoint and preview command.
The external Codex Desktop sidecar handoff recommended an exception-first UI that avoids approval/import mutation in the first tranche.
The internal sidecar scout independently recommended the narrowest route: one App Router page plus one focused Playwright smoke.
constrained_outputs: Add /pm-review/import-candidate as a read-only operations-web route.
Render candidate summary, required decisions, warnings, proposed workpackages/tasks, source traceability, resource context, allowed-now guardrails, and not-allowed-now guardrails.
Add a focused Playwright smoke that stubs the read endpoint and asserts zero mutation requests.
Link the route from the operations-web shell and PM workflow docs.
validation_steps: corepack pnpm exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-candidate.smoke.spec.ts (from apps/operations-web)
validation_results: operations-web typecheck passed after refreshed Next route types were generated by build.
handoff_target: Delegated Technical Repo Authority / PM Runtime Product Coordinator
sql_permission_note: Packet 2026-05-15-pm-lane-033 does not authorize SQL writes, schema migration, live data mutation, production import, workbook writeback, macro execution, Render deployment, Vercel promotion, auth widening, ingress widening, package dependency addition, approval persistence, candidate edit persistence, import mutation, schedule mutation, assignment mutation, status mutation, or autonomous AI business-state mutation.
